column7: Supports nitrogen-intensive hybrid vigor; critical at PI stage for grain filling and protein accumulation.
Provides complete nutritional foundation; critical for hybrid vigor expression in first 3 weeks.
Boosts photosynthetic efficiency through Rubisco activation; sulfur critical for N metabolism.
Improves hybrid stability across environments; K reduces susceptibility to environmental stresses.
Microbially synthesized compounds promote root exudate activity; improves rhizosphere microbiome for better nutrient uptake in next-gen hybrid.
Bacteria component fixes additional atmospheric N; combined bio-nano action supports next-gen hybrid's high demand.
Organic compounds suppress pathogenic soil microbes; creates healthier rhizosphere environment for next-gen hybrid roots.
Azolla as pre-crop green manure builds soil N bank; beneficial for next-gen hybrid's high N demand at vegetative stage.
